title: Experiment with Azure Machine Learning
summary: Learn how to find the best model with automated machine learning (AutoML) and by experimenting in notebooks.

sections.title: Experiment with Azure Machine Learning
sections.summary: Learn how to find the best model with automated machine learning (AutoML) and by experimenting in notebooks.

lessons.title: Find the best classification model with Automated Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to find the best classification model with automated machine learning (AutoML). You'll use the Python SDK (v2) to configure and run an AutoML job.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/find-best-classification-model-automated-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Find the best classification model with Automated Machine Learning

lessons.title: Track model training in Jupyter notebooks with MLflow
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use MLflow for model tracking when experimenting in notebooks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/track-model-training-jupyter-notebooks-mlflow/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Track model training in Jupyter notebooks with MLflow

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Experiment with Azure Machine Learning
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Experiment with Azure Machine Learning**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
